no_filtered_tasks: No background tasks match these filters
no_filtered_tasks_desc: Adjust the filters or clear them to review the full task history.
task_cleanup_desc: Only completed task records are removed. Pending, processing, and retry tasks stay untouched.
task_cleanup_finished_before: Clean up tasks completed before this time
task_cleanup_confirm_desc: This deletes task records completed before {{finishedBefore}} with kind "{{kind}}" and status "{{status}}".
task_cleanup_confirm_desc_invalid: Choose a valid completion time before continuing.
no_tasks_desc: Recorded background task history will appear here after jobs start running.
